description: Evaluates enterprise security culture maturity—top-down propagation of security awareness, compliance incentives, and workforce understanding of security measures.

capabilities.name: Top Down Security culture
capabilities.description: Security culture is propagated enterprise-wide with leadership support, compliance is rewarded, and the workforce understands why security measures are in place.
evaluation_focus: Workforce understanding of why security measures are in place

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
